videos.title: Mardu Humans and a Giant Chicken
videos.description:
I love my Mardu humans commander deck !  So I wanted to try the archetype in Standard with potentially some fun Mardu Siegebreaker action.

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/single-scoop-mardu-humans-and-a-giant-chicken
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7337687#paper

◼ Purchase this deck (paper): http://mtg.fish/Tq5Hc
◼ Purchase this deck (Magic Online): http://mtg.fish/xJy0s
